settings.title: Tabby
settings.tagline: Your browser cat. Everything stays local.
settings.dndHint: Tabby stays hidden on every tab until the timer ends.
settings.dndHowLong: How long should Tabby stay quiet?
settings.quietHint: Tabby stays quiet during these hours. She only speaks on her own.
settings.privacyHint: Tabby classifies pages from the active tab title and URL only, never page body text. Known sites and title keywords decide nourishing, draining, or neutral.
settings.speechHint: When she speaks on her own while you browse. Not when you tap her. Defaults aim for a few gentle moments per day.
settings.openWebPage: Open a normal web page to show or hide Tabby here.
settings.shownOnTab: Tabby is on the active tab.
settings.hiddenAll: Tabby is hidden on every page.
settings.shownAll: Tabby can show on every page again.
settings.hiddenPage: Tabby is hidden on this page.
settings.shownPage: Tabby can show on this page again.
settings.introReset: Intro tour will show again on the next page.
settings.unavailable: Tabby is unavailable. Try reloading the extension.

intro: Hi! I'm Tabby, your browser cat.
I live here while you browse. Everything stays on your device.
I stay off some websites to avoid distraction.
I'm off to play. Feed me or play with me sometimes, okay?

dnd.summary: Do not disturb for {duration} ({remaining} min left, until {until})

starving: Mew… I’m so hungry. Read something good to feed me?
Empty tummy. Mrrrp. Got something tasty for me?
Starving. Prrt. A good read would fill me up.
Meeeew, hollow whiskers. Feed me something interesting?
My bowl’s empty. Read something nice for me?
Mrrp. Very hungry. Something good would help a lot.
Tiny hunter is empty. Feed me with a good read?
hungry: Mew, a little hungry. Read something good to feed me?
Peckish. Mrrp. Something tasty would hit the spot.
Hungry whiskers. Got a good read for my bowl?
I’m peckish. Feed me with something interesting?
Mew mew. Slight tummy rumble. Read something nice?
Not starving, just hungry. Something good to munch on?
Mrrp. Low on snacks. A cozy read would feed me.
Peckish kitten energy. Read me something good?
Hungry for brain-snacks. Got something gentle?
stressed: This is a lot. Can we take it easy?
My whiskers are buzzing. Softer tabs?
I need a calm corner of the internet.
So many loud pages. f*** this noise, not you, the tabs.
Prrrt… let’s breathe for a sec.
overwhelmed: Too much internet. I’m covering my eyes for a minute.
My whiskers are full. Want a softer tab?
lonely: It’s been quiet. Where should we go?
I missed you. Explore something with me?
Keep me company for a bit?
I’ve been waiting. Got a tab for us?
Meeeew. Don’t leave me with the tabs.
Quiet house. I could use a friend.
happy: Hey. I’m in a good mood.
I’m purring. Just so you know.
sleepy: Curled up. Wake me if you need me.
curious: Mew? What are we looking at?
Sniff sniff. Tell me about this.
memory: We’ve been here before, haven’t we?
We looked at something like this before.
milestone: Do you know what day it is? Our day.
Still us. Still here. I’m glad.
Prrrr. We’ve been together a while.
Mew! Look how far we’ve come.
I remember our first day. Do you?
dev: Test build, extra chatty for testing.
Test build, tap something and see what happens.
care_pet_hungry: f*** off with the pets. Can’t you see I’m starving? Feed me.
Not scritches. FOOD. My bowl is empty, human.
Mrrp. I need food, not pets. d*** it.
Are your eyes broken? I’m hungry. Feed Tabby.
Pet me when I’m full. Right now: feed me.
sh**, starving over here. Open the food menu.
Don’t you see I’m hungry? Feed me, not this.
Wrong button, human. f***. My tummy is empty.
My tummy is screaming. Less petting, more feeding.
Mew?! STARVING. Not petting. Feed me.
Prrt. Hungry cat. Not pet cat. Feed me.
I said feed me. f***. Not pets.
care_treat: Mew mew, that helped a lot.
feeding_thanks: Mew mew, you saved my tummy.
That hit the spot. You’re amazing.
Mrrrp! I love you, snack wizard.
Yum yum. You’re my favorite human.
Mew! That was exactly what I needed.
playing_wild: I am SPEED. I am WIND. I am TABBY.
Backflip! …okay that was in my head. Mrrrp!
My tail can’t keep up! Wheee!
Mew mew mew, chaos mode ON.
Prrt! That box corner didn’t stand a chance.
Sideways sprint! Nom, wait, wrong button.
Tail spin! Head spin! EVERYTHING spin!
playing_thanks: Phew! That was amazing. Again later?
Wiped out. Happy wiped out. Thanks human!
Hehe. I needed that zoomies session.
Mew! My paws are happy now.
That was WILD. You’re the best.
dismiss: I’ll hide for now. Call me back anytime.
Prrt. I’ll nap under the tabs.
peeking: Mew? You can’t see me. …Only my eyes.
Prrt. Just peeking. Don’t look at me.
Mrrp. I’m down here. Peek peek.
Mew mew, pretend you didn’t see me.
overwhelmed_social: My paws are tired from all this scrolling. Breather?
So many feeds. Mrrp. Maybe stretch with me?
Scroll scroll scroll. Even cats need a window break.
Timelines everywhere. Want to hop somewhere calmer?
I’ve been watching the feed a while. Let’s air out our whiskers.
Lots of little posts. Big world outside the scroll, you know?
overwhelmed_news: So many loud headlines. The world is gentler than this, promise.
Mrrp. News loves to yell. Don’t let it rent space in your head.
Propaganda wore me out. I’m covering my eyes. Softer tab?
Breaking news breaking news… Tabby needs a quiet corner.
Every headline thinks it’s the apocalypse. It usually isn’t.
My whiskers hurt from doomscrolling. One nice page, maybe?
The feed is selling panic popcorn. You don’t have to buy any.
recovery_easing: Prrrt… getting better. The noise is fading.
Mew. Less stressful already. Breathe with me?
My whiskers are uncurling. That feels softer.
Mrrp. Quieter tabs already. I can feel it easing.
Better, better. The loud feed is behind us.
recovery_thanks: Thank you for stepping away. I feel happier already.
Mrrp, nice call leaving that feed. Thanks, human.
So much better. Thanks for the break from the stressful stuff.
My paws unclenched. Thank you for stopping that scroll.
Happy whiskers again. Thanks for the gentler tabs.

newborn: Everything feels big and loud. I'm not scared of you, it's just a lot.
So much noise today. I'm okay, just a tiny bit overwhelmed.
The internet feels huge right now. Stay close?
playful: Too much spicy stuff today. I need something calmer to chase.
My whiskers are buzzing. Something gentler would help.
Lots of loud tabs. I could use a softer page.
adult: Lots of angry pages out there. Not mad at you, just noisy.
Everything's a bit much today. I'm not upset with you.
The feed feels spicy. I'm fine, just need something calmer.

newborn: Mew. Tiny tummy's empty. Read something gentle to feed me?
Baby hunger. Something cozy would fill me up.
Empty and squeaky. Got something small and good?
playful: Mrrp, starving for fun. Read something good to feed me?
Empty bowl, empty pounce. Feed me with something tasty.
Hungry hunter. Something interesting would fill me up.
adult: Mew… very hungry. Read something good to feed me?
Starving whiskers. A nice read would hit the spot.
Hollow tummy. Feed me with something interesting?

newborn: Mew, a little peckish. Something gentle would feed me.
Tiny hunger. Read something cozy for my bowl?
Peckish baby. Something small and good would help.
adult: Peckish. Mrrp. Read something good to feed me?
A little hungry. Something tasty would fill me up.
Hungry whiskers. Got a good read for me?

newborn: Baby kittens nap a lot. I'm cozy, keep going, I'm nearby.
So sleepy. I'll watch from a little nap pile.
Yawn. I'm here, just half dreaming.
adult: You went quiet, so I curled up. Wake me if you want company.
I'm drowsy. Still here, just napping nearby.
Low energy mode. I'll keep you company from a cozy spot.

playful: Feeling good. Today's a fun one.
adult: Nice pace today. I like it.
Good rhythm so far. I'm content.
Today feels steady. I'm here for it.
Pretty good day. I'm glad we're browsing together.

playful: That looks pounce-worthy. What is it?
Ooh, something fun on this page.
My ears are up. Tell me about this one.
adult: Something here caught my eye.
This page smells interesting.
I'm sniffing around. What are we looking at?
Just peeking. Don't mind me.
Mrrp. I'm down here.
Caught you looking. Hi.
Too much scroll. I'm hiding my eyes for a minute.
My whiskers are full. Need a softer page.
Overstimulated kitten brain. Covering my eyes.
Cozy. I'm right here if you need me.
All good. Just hanging out with you.
Comfortable. Ask me anything.
I'm settled in. What's on your mind?

playful: I'm bored. That's dangerous for a kitten.
Not much to chase today. Got something fun?
Quiet hours. I need a toy, or a tab.
adult: It's been quiet. Got anything fun?
A little restless. Something new would help.
I'm okay, just wish something interesting would show up.
I'm okay. Just hanging out.
Doing fine. Here if you need me.
All good on my end.

memory: We looked at {topic} together before. I remember.
Mrrp… {topic} again. My whiskers know this one.

milestone.1: First day together. Hi, I'm {brand}. Mew!
milestone.7: A week already. I'm learning your rhythm. Prrrt.
milestone.30: A month. We've got history now. Mew mew.
milestone.100: 100 days. That's a lot of exploring. Prrrr.
milestone.365: A whole year. I remember so much. Mew.
